name: phase2-infrastructure-archetype-evidence
description: Phase 2 requirements confirm Infrastructure archetype: (1) BunSqlExecutor is internal platform capability with no external API calls, (2) MCP tools are internal tool exposure, not external service integration, (3) DDL execution is schema-driven internal operation, (4) All data flows are local (Bun.sql to local/remote Postgres, not third-party SaaS). No service provider abstraction needed - this is core platform infrastructure.
recommendation: Confirms Infrastructure archetype. Implementation follows mixin-composition pattern (PostgresBackend), not service-interface pattern (no IPostgresService needed).
